status_boundary: PASS_SOURCE_COVERAGE means the ledger preserves source-bound cosmohedron inequality-layer and face-lattice material needed by the R13 intrinsic/native vs degenerative/saturation equality-classification target. It is not a mathematical proof, not a typed predicate model, not an intrinsic-vs-degenerative theorem, not substrate evidence, not engineering readiness, and not a physical settling-law result.

support_summary.allowed_inference: R13 may cite source-bound inequality, shaving, grouped-delta, face-lattice, and Matryoshka-poset material as inputs to a later equality-classification model
support_summary.blocked_inference: typed predicate proof, intrinsic-vs-degenerative theorem, Lean/Z3 proof, Formation Medium substrate evidence, physical settling law, or engineering readiness
support_summary.checked_interface: ledger/source coverage for cosmohedron inequality-layer and face-lattice sources needed by the R13 equality-classification target
